title: Medical Exam Analyzer
subtitle: Assistive clinical analysis of medical exams by computational processing

dropzone.title: Drag and drop the exam file here
dropzone.subtitle: Supports PDF, PNG or JPEG up to 10MB

toast.uploadError: Failed to submit exam for analysis.

uploader.errorLimit: The file exceeds the allowed limit of 15MB.
uploader.errorType: Unsupported file type. Please send images or PDF.
uploader.title: Submit Exam for Analysis
uploader.subtitle: Drag radiological exam files, clinical photos or laboratory PDFs. The analysis is assistive and probabilistic.
uploader.fileGuidelines: Images (PNG, JPG, DICOM) or PDF files up to 15MB
uploader.consentDesc: I confirm that I have the patient's express authorization to submit their data and images for assistive clinical processing.
uploader.anonymizeDesc: Replace the submitted file name with a secure cryptographic UUID identifier before writing to temporary storage.

card.noExamDesc: Select an exam from the side history or upload a new exam to view preliminary findings.
card.processingDesc: Our multimodal artificial intelligence is extracting findings and assessing image quality. Please wait.
card.failedDesc: Could not process the exam image. Check if the format is valid and try again.
card.cause2: Excessively cropped image or inappropriate framing.
card.cause3: Illegible image or severe motion blur.
card.cause4: Multiple exams or documents mixed in the same file.
